fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Contains the comment type. There are six options to choose from: General, Fault, Resolution, Accessory, Internal, and Service Item Loaner.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Contains the number of the service order, service item, service contract, or loaner that the service comment applies to based on the Type field.

fields.name: Table Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the table line number.
The program uses this field internally.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the line.
The program uses this field internally.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date you entered the service comment.
